headline: Simple. Fast. Done.
subheadline: From first conversation to live website in just a few days.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We have a quick call to understand your business, your goals, and your style preferences. No technical knowledge needed.

steps.title: Design & Build
steps.description: We design and build your website. You'll review a preview before anything goes live.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Your site goes live on your domain — fast, clean, and ready to impress visitors.

steps.title: Monthly Care
steps.description: We keep your site running, secure, and up to date — every single month, without you lifting a finger.
